title: Senior Backend Engineer, Key Management
location: Tel Aviv-Yafo, Tel Aviv District, Israel
score_reasoning: Your senior backend experience and distributed systems expertise align well with the role's core requirements—7+ years, high-scale systems, and mission-critical platforms are direct matches. Your production experience with Python, Go, Docker, AWS, and observability (OpenTelemetry, Prometheus) covers the primary tech stack. However, the role heavily emphasizes C++ systems programming, cryptography, and MPC/threshold signatures where you lack production evidence; these are presented as core to the team's work, creating a meaningful tech gap (−12 points). The critical blocker is location: the role is based in Tel Aviv, Israel with no explicit remote option stated, and your strong preference is remote or Berlin-hybrid within Europe/UK/Switzerland. This geography mismatch and timezone difference (>3h from Berlin) place remote_location_fit at 20, forcing a mandatory skip unless the company later clarifies remote flexibility. Even with company prestige (Fireblocks is a strong fintech brand), the combination of location hard stop and core crypto/C++ skill gap makes this role not viable for your current setup.

red_flags: C++ as primary language (your background is Python/Go only)
Cryptography and MPC expertise required; no production evidence in CV
On-site/Israel-based location with no remote option explicitly stated
Timezone >3h from Berlin (significant mismatch with your ±2h preference)
Requires distributed SQL experience; your focus is PostgreSQL/MySQL (relational, strong match) but 'distributed SQL' may imply specialized systems (CockroachDB, Spanner) with limited evidence in CV
